title: Want to hire a Monday expert to do automations and streamline our workflow
excerpt:
Hello, 
We are a Norwegian webdesign-company (6 persons) and we have now used Monday as our primary project management tool for the last 2 years. But everything we do, we do manually and it takes up alot of our time ever…

posts.author: Nettpakke (Christian Bakke)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

We are a Norwegian webdesign-company (6 persons) and we have now used Monday as our primary project management tool for the last 2 years. But everything we do, we do manually and it takes up alot of our time everyday to log all our actions in Monday.

We want to hire an expert that can help us with automations and to set up our workflow so that everything works smoothly and more effective. For example when we register a new client with all information, it would be nice if some button could copy this information in to the “Production” board. Now I have to write in the same information in 4 different boards everytime we make a sale (Client list, production pipe, Support pipe and hosting pipe)

Anyone?

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Nettpakke - you have certainly come to the right place as there are plenty of Monday experts to help you. What you are briefly describing is certainly possible through native automations, especially if there is continuity in the columns across the boards.

I would love the opportunity to discuss this in more detail in a 30-60 minute complementary discovery session. Feel free to message me directly at info@greenllamas.com and also check us out online to learn more about what we do!

Also - I am going to move this topic to the “Hire an Expert” category in the community for better visibility.

Thank you,
Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

Green Llamas is here to help you make all your People and Projects Green. Let us get your herds under control using the monday.com platform.

posts.author: Nettpakke (Christian Bakke)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for your reply and for moving my post to more suited category!

I have now sent an e-mail to you, check spam folder if it’s not in your inbox

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks @Nettpakke - checking now. Thanks for getting back.

posts.author: timlittletech (Tim Little)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Nettpakke It sounds like you are already connecting with Mark who is a great resource.

But in case you still need additional help feel free to set up a call with me at: Calendly - Tim Little
I’ve helped many customers with complex automations and integrations to help automate workflows and processes. I also assist with integromat as well which is a tool that can expand the automation and integration capabilities of monday.com.

Best of luck!

posts.author: LucaOmnidea (Luca Carraro)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hej Christian @Nettpakke ,

Luca fra Italien her. Jeg er en Customer Success Manager fra Omnidea, meget gammel monday.com partner! Hvordan gaar det?

I’ve read that you’re looking for help to optimize your workflows, but other ppl have already offered their help though… Feel free to contact me whenever you want if you need more support.

Have en dejlig dag,

Hilsen fra Italien

posts.cookedHtml: I have scheduled a time with you tomorrow

posts.author: Nettpakke (Christian Bakke)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello! I would love to take a quick chat with you regarding this, when do you have time?

Cheers,

posts.cookedHtml: I can do tomorrow 5pm, does this work? Please send me an invite to christian@nettpakke.no
